name: tonylnng--tonic-system-deploy
description: Software deployment workflow for systems with separate UAT and PROD environments. Use when: planning a bug fix deployment, choosing between Flow 1 (UAT-first) and Flow 2 (PROD-first), handling emergency hotfixes, executing rollbacks, or designing automated nightly deploy pipelines. Covers approval gates, human checkpoints, system automation nodes, Telegram notifications, and rollback procedures.
